repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 100: Couldn't resolve reference to 'min'.: AGREE does not recognize 'min' as a built-in function without explicit declaration or import -> remove the 'min' function call and replace with explicit conditional logic using visible ports
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 100: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'real' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: Type error caused by unresolved 'min' function making right-hand side invalid -> replace 'min(gcas_timeToFailure, tcas_timeToFailure, geof_timeToFailure)' with an equivalent AGREE-compliant expression using only visible symbols
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 101: Couldn't resolve reference to 'concurrencyFactor'.: AGREE does not recognize 'concurrencyFactor' as a built-in or declared function -> remove the 'concurrencyFactor' function calls and replace with valid boolean expressions using only visible ports
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 101: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'bool' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: Type error caused by unresolved 'concurrencyFactor' function making right-hand side invalid -> remove all 'concurrencyFactor' uses and replace with valid boolean logic using only visible ports
